'''tashaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebiche|cebiche]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebiche|cebiche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tashaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæshæhæth|tæshæhæth]] || [[word:tæshæhæj|tæshæhæj]] || [[word:tæshæhæsh|tæshæhæsh]] || [[word:tæshæhæ|tæshæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashashahath|tashashahath]] || [[word:tashashahaj|tashashahaj]] || [[word:tashashahash|tashashahash]] || [[word:tashashaha|tashashaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashahath|tashahath]] || [[word:tashahaj|tashahaj]] || [[word:tashahash|tashahash]] || [[word:tashaha|tashaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashafhath|tashafhath]] || [[word:tashafhaj|tashafhaj]] || [[word:tashafhash|tashafhash]] || [[word:tashafhaf|tashafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashahatha|tashahatha]] || [[word:tashahaja|tashahaja]] || [[word:tashahasha|tashahasha]] || [[word:tashahaka|tashahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashahath|tashahath]] || [[word:tashahaj|tashahaj]] || [[word:tashahash|tashahash]] || [[word:tashaha|tashaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashahathal|tashahathal]] || [[word:tashahajal|tashahajal]] || [[word:tashahashal|tashahashal]] || [[word:tashahakal|tashahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashahathatha|tashahathatha]] || [[word:tashahajaja|tashahajaja]] || [[word:tashahashasha|tashahashasha]] || [[word:tashahaka|tashahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashahathan|tashahathan]] || [[word:tashahajan|tashahajan]] || [[word:tashahashan|tashahashan]] || [[word:tashahakan|tashahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashahathaoro|tashahathaoro]] || [[word:tashahajaoro|tashahajaoro]] || [[word:tashahashaoro|tashahashaoro]] || [[word:tashahakaoro|tashahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
